description.ko: 유리 프리즘을 통과하는 백색광이 선명한 기하학적 굴절 패턴과 함께 찬란한 무지개 빛깔로 분산되는 놀라운 시각적 형상입니다.
description.en: A stunning visualization of white light passing through a glass prism, splitting into a vibrant spectrum of colors with sharp geometric refraction patterns.

prompt: A high-resolution cinematic shot of a triangular crystal prism on a dark reflective surface. A single beam of sharp white light enters the prism and exits as a beautiful, dispersed rainbow spectrum. Intricate light refraction, caustic patterns, 8k, hyper-realistic, optical physics, vibrant colors.
